title: Treatment of cyclosporiasis (Cyclospora) - Canada.ca
content:
## Treatment of cyclosporiasis (Cyclospora)
Learn how cyclosporiasis is diagnosed and treated.
- How is cyclosporiasis diagnosed?
- How is cyclosporiasis treated?

## How is cyclosporiasis diagnosed?
Cyclospora is diagnosed by the identification of cyclospora oocysts in stool sample.

## How is cyclosporiasis treated?
Cyclosporiasis is treated with a prescription medication. Your symptoms will probably improve within 2 to 3 days after you start taking medication.
However, it may take several weeks before your intestinal problems completely disappear.
